description: Combined index of n8n workflow JSON exports in this repository. Each entry matches the corresponding *.meta.json sidecar.

workflows.workflow_file: My first workflow Linkedin Updates -  RM Apr 3.json
workflows.sidecar_file: My first workflow Linkedin Updates -  RM Apr 3.meta.json
workflows.title: LinkedIn post from chat (first workflow)
workflows.n8n_workflow_name: My first workflow Linkedin Updates -  RM Apr 3
workflows.summary: Chat-triggered AI agent that turns a topic into an engaging LinkedIn post using Google Gemini and can publish via the LinkedIn tool, with short conversation memory.
workflows.notes: Introductory workflow: agent writes LinkedIn-style content from user messages; credentials must be configured in your n8n instance after import.

workflows.workflow_file: Linkedin Update using RAG - RM Apr 5.json
workflows.sidecar_file: Linkedin Update using RAG - RM Apr 5.meta.json
workflows.title: LinkedIn updates with RAG (schedule + search)
workflows.n8n_workflow_name: Linkedin Update using RAG - RM Apr 5
workflows.summary: Manual-run AI agent that follows a weekday content schedule: searches with Gemini, references a sample post from Google Docs (RAG-style), then drafts and posts to LinkedIn. Uses date/time to pick the topic for the current day.
integrations: OpenRouter — chat model for the agent
Google Docs — sample post / reference content
Date & Time tool — weekday topic selection
credentials_required: OpenRouter API (or equivalent for the OpenRouter chat node)
Google Docs / Google account access for Docs tool
workflows.notes: After import, reconnect credentials and verify Google Docs document access for the sample-post tool.

workflows.title: Multi-agent stock analysis (fundamental + technical)
workflows.summary: Chat workflow with an orchestrator agent that delegates to specialized agents for fundamental and technical analysis, each using Gemini search tools, then merges results. Includes email output via Gmail.
integrations: Google Gemini (PaLM) API — multiple chat models for orchestrator and sub-agents
Gemini Search tools — research before answering
Gmail — send structured analysis by email
credentials_required: Gmail OAuth2 or Google API access for Gmail node
workflows.notes: Sub-agents are wired as tools under the orchestrator; re-map credentials and Gmail sender after import.
